problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region may resolve How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
